common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this profile?
common.notFoundDesc: The page you are trying to access does not exist or has been removed.

auth.welcomeBack: Welcome back, please enter your credentials
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up now
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Return to login
auth.formatErrorUsername: Invalid username: alphanumeric characters only, 5-15 characters
auth.formatErrorPassword: Invalid password: minimum 8 characters, must include letters and numbers
auth.authFailed: Authentication failed, please check username or password
auth.networkError: Network error, please try again later

setup.title: Setup Guide
setup.subtitle: Configure your device to use Obex DNS and take control of your internet security.
setup.profileMatch: You are filtering through this profile.
setup.profileMismatch: Using Obex, but Profile ID mismatch.
setup.verifyHint: Complete the setup below, then click to verify.
setup.dohDesc: DNS over HTTPS (DoH) is a protocol for performing remote Domain Name System (DNS) resolution via the HTTPS protocol.
setup.dohBenefit1: Reduce hijacking and eavesdropping by network middleboxes
setup.dohBenefit2: Enhance DNS resolution and internet access security
setup.browserSteps: Settings > Privacy and security > Security > Use secure DNS > With: Custom > Paste URL.
setup.appleDesc: Apple devices support quick configuration via profiles.
setup.appleWarning: Profiles cannot be installed in "Lockdown Mode". Ensure it is disabled before installing.
setup.appleInstallHint: After downloading, go to Settings > Profile Downloaded to install
setup.windowsStep1: Settings > Network & internet > Ethernet/Wi-Fi > DNS server assignment > Edit > Manual.
setup.windowsStep3: Enable DNS over HTTPS (Manual template) and paste URL.
setup.androidDesc: Recommended to use apps like Intra and manually enter the DoH URL.
setup.androidWarning: Note: Native 'Private DNS' uses DoT, this project currently only supports DoH.

rules.title: Custom Rules
rules.subtitle: Manually control resolution behavior (block, allow, or redirect) for specific domains.
rules.noRulesDesc: You haven't added any manual rules yet.

analytics.noRecords: No records found for this period

logs.title: Query Logs
logs.subtitle: View DNS resolution logs and block records for this profile.
logs.noRecordsDesc: No DNS queries received in the selected time range.

filtering.title: External Filter Lists
filtering.subtitle: Subscribe to third-party maintained domain blocklists (e.g., AdGuard, etc.).
filtering.formatHosts: Hosts format: compatible with standard hosts files (e.g., 0.0.0.0 domain.com).
filtering.noListsDesc: You haven't subscribed to any external filter lists yet.

settings.title: Profile Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your DNS resolution policy and advanced options.
settings.saveError: Failed to save settings, please try again
settings.upstreamDesc: All queries not blocked will be forwarded to this server by the application.
settings.retentionDesc: Expired logs will be cleared from the database automatically.
settings.noRecordsReturned: No records returned for this query.
settings.blockModeDesc: What to return when a domain is blocked
settings.exportError: Failed to export profile, please try again later

account.title: Account Settings
account.subtitle: Manage your security credentials and system users.
account.clearLogsDesc: This will delete all query logs generated by all DNS profiles under your account. This action cannot be undone.
account.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action will result in the loss of all your configurations.
account.formatErrorUsername: Invalid username: alphanumeric characters only, 5-15 characters
account.formatErrorPassword: Invalid password: minimum 8 characters, must include letters and numbers
account.confirmDeleteUser: Are you sure you want to delete this user? All configurations owned by them will also be removed.
account.confirmClearLogs: Are you sure you want to clear query logs for all your profiles? This action cannot be undone.
account.confirmDeleteAccount:
WARNING: Are you sure you want to delete this account?

All your DNS configurations, custom rules, and query logs will be permanently deleted. This action is irreversible!
account.inactivityDesc: To save resources, accounts with no DNS activity in the last 180 days will be automatically cleaned up, including their configurations and all associated logs.

intro.item1Desc: A high-performance resolver based on Cloudflare Workers & D1, built for speed and security.
intro.item2Desc: Prevent hijacking and enhance privacy with DNS over HTTPS (RFC 8484) encrypted tunnels.
intro.item3Desc: Experience ultra-fast resolution with 0ms-class latency thanks to Cloudflare's massive edge network.
intro.item4Desc: Full support for Allow/Block lists, AdGuard rules, and custom DNS record redirections.
intro.item5Desc: Visualize your network health with detailed query logs and comprehensive statistics dashboards.
intro.item6Desc: A high-density management panel designed for engineers and home users alike, based on Blueprint UI developed at Palantir.
intro.item7Desc: Serverless architecture ensures zero maintenance and infinite scalability for your private DNS.
intro.item8Desc: Create and manage multiple configurations for different devices or network environments.
